title: Nicklegigg's Hulk Origins Pack
description: Be able to play as many versions of the Hulk.
body:
# This is an Origins pack that features many versions of The Incredible Hulk. 

## **Most of these are meant to have at least some level of balance so keep this in mind.** 

_Playable versions of the Hulk:_
- Joe Fixit
- Savage Hulk
- HULK 2003 
- Red Hulk
- Professor Hulk 
- Infernal Hulk
- Solar Hulk
- Ultimate Hulk
- The Amazing Bulk
- Zombie Hulk 
- Immortal Hulk
- Human Mutant
- TOBA Hulk (Extremely destructive so be careful when using it)

### Update 1.2.5 might be the last update so please if you find any bugs or you have any suggestions, send them to me through the post on the Origins discord server.
**[https://discord.com/channels/734127708488859831/1300809093727912006](https://discord.com/channels/734127708488859831/1300809093727912006)**
